title: Make all URLs in search results clickable and open in same tab

requirements.text: Modify the SearchInterface component to detect and render all URLs in search results as clickable anchor tags that open in the same tab (without target="_blank")

quotes: Open in the same tab and make all URLs clickable and open the URL directly

acceptanceCriteria: All URLs in search result abstracts, titles, and related topics are automatically detected and rendered as <a> tags
Clicking any URL navigates to that URL in the same browser tab
URLs maintain the existing color scheme and styling consistent with the application's design
If a search result title contains a URL, clicking the title opens that URL directly

requirements.text: Ensure that clicking on a search result title or link navigates directly to the URL without opening in a new tab
acceptanceCriteria: Search result titles are clickable and navigate to their URLs in the same tab
No new tabs or windows are opened when clicking search results
The navigation is immediate without additional confirmation dialogs

constraints: Do not change the backend search API implementation
Maintain the existing OKLCH color system and visual design
Preserve the current search interface layout and structure
nonGoals: Opening URLs in new tabs or windows
Adding URL preview or validation features
Changing the search API or backend logic
Adding external link icons or indicators
